title: Shoreline
tagline: Full-stack hospitality management platform with analytics.
description: Shoreline is a restaurant and hospitality management platform featuring reservation tracking, staff scheduling, inventory control, and a live analytics dashboard — built with Flask and a PostgreSQL backend.
story: Inspired by the chaos of watching a beachside restaurant try to manage reservations on a whiteboard and staff schedules on a shared Google Sheet. Shoreline was built to be the single source of truth for a hospitality operation.
forWho: Restaurant managers and hospitality operators who need a unified back-office system without the enterprise price tag.

detailedSpecs.architecture: Monolithic Flask app with Blueprint-based routing. PostgreSQL for persistent data, Alembic for schema versioning.
keyPatterns: Blueprint modularization per domain (reservations, staff, inventory)
Alembic migration chain for zero-downtime schema changes
Chart.js dashboard fed by Flask API endpoints
